A Malaysian association has come under fire after warning that wider work-from-home arrangements would hurt urban businesses, with critics accusing it of prioritising city-centre takings over the government’s effort to cut fuel use across the country and rein in soaring subsidy costs.

news.headline: Lahore-bound Shalimar Express derails near Sheikhupura; rail traffic suspended
news.summary:
<p>LAHORE: The Lahore-bound Shalimar Express derailed near Sheikhupura on Friday, leaving rail traffic on the Faisalabad–Lahore section suspended.</p>
<p>According to official sources, one of the passenger coaches of the train derailed while it was heading towards Lahore. No injuri

news.headline: China healthcare stocks outgain Hong Kong market as Middle East roils global investments
news.summary:
China’s healthcare sector has been drawing offshore capital to Hong Kong-listed stocks as investors look for safe havens amid global volatility in commodities.

news.headline: Xi meets Taiwan opposition chief, expresses ‘full confidence’ in China-Taiwan unity
news.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping reiterated his opposition to Taiwanese independence during a meeting with Cheng Li-wun, leader of Taiwan's pro-Beijing opposition Kuomintang (KMT) party.
